summary: Tested new Markets page features: 7 ETFs, 5 FRED interest rates, housing endpoint with 20 city Case-Shiller indices. All 13 backend tests passed. UI verified via Playwright - all grids render correctly with live data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Markets page fully verified. /api/market/rates returns 5 rates + 7 ETFs (spy/qqq/dia/vnq/iwm/tlt/gld). /api/market/housing returns national HPI with yoy, median_price, housing_starts + 20 cities. UI shows Interest Rates (5 cards), Market ETFs (7 cards in 4-col grid), Housing national (3 cards), City grid (20 cards). Refresh button visible and functional. All data is live from FRED/Finnhub.
